subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Thou through Whom the Sun of inner meanings hath dawned from the horizon of the heaven of utterance, and through Whom the realms of knowledge have been adorned [3.5s]... ...I plead my grief and my sorrow to God, the Lord of mankind.  Things have been turned upside down and countries are in turmoil
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا من بک اشرق نیر المعانی من افق سماء البیان و تزینت عوالم العلم و
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @family of Muhammad; early figures in Islam
